title: Intensely Nutty American Chicken Biryani
description: A kid-friendly American dish featuring biryani masala and a nutty flavor, cooked to perfection on a cedar plank in a papillote
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit
In a large bowl, mix together the chicken, biryani masala, almond flour, pecans, ghee, paprika, salt, and pepper
Place a large piece of parchment paper on a cedar plank
Add the chicken mixture to the parchment paper, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges
Fold the parchment paper over the chicken to create a papillote, and press the edges to seal
Bake the chicken for 25 minutes, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 165 degrees Fahrenheit
Remove the chicken from the oven and let it rest for 5 minutes before serving
Serve the chicken hot, garnished with additional pecans if desired
